site.title: Trips Between Deadlines
site.description: Personal travel diary — trip logs, real costs, and honest notes from weekends and holidays.
hero.title: Trips Between Deadlines
hero.description: A place to write down trips — where I went, where I stayed, what it cost, and what I'd change next time. Written between weekends and deadlines.
home.about.text: Written by someone with a desk job who travels when he can. These notes started as a personal log — turns out they're useful for others planning the same trips too.
journal.title: Travel Journal
journal.subtitle: All trip entries, newest first.
gallery.title: Photos
gallery.subtitle: Snapshots from the trips — nothing staged, just what I saw.
about.title: About
